column1: a=(t:part) particle prefixed to form nouns (e:~ kipat cil/~ khiatna) (w:the/a/an)
a=(t:part) particle prefixed to form verb past tense (e:~ piangsak hi)
cil=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate nominative case (e:a kipat ~)
cil=(t:part) particle suffixed to form verb past tense (e:a kipat ~)
cil=(t:conj) early stage (e:a kipat ~/a ~ a kipan)
in=(t:ppm) postpositional marker indicating place or time (equivalent in usage to the prepositions <in/at/among>) (e:a kipat cil ~)
te=(t:part) particle suffixes to nouns indicating plural form (e:mi~/lo~/pasian~)
ah=(t:ppm) postpositional marker indicating place or time (e:Koi lai-~ om hiam)
maw=(t:part) sentence final denoting interrogation or exclamation (e:an neding ~)
hiam=(t:part) final particle of interrogative sentence collocating with initial particles (with such as <bang,kua>, as in, na min bang ~?)
hiam=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:Bang hang ~ cih leh)
hi=(t:ppm) word indicating nominative case (as in <Pasian thu ~>)
hi=(t:ppm) word indicating the verb ending a sentence (as in <a piangsak ~/a gen ~>)
hi maw=(t:phrase) (w:is that so/really/yes) denoting interrogation or exclamation
le=(t:conj) (e:khatpeuh in Kain a thah  ~ tua pa tungah a zah sagihin kithuk ding hi) (s:ale)
leh=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:Bang hang hiam cih ~)
leh=(t:conj) (e:khatpeuh in Kain a thah  ~ tua pa tungah a zah sagihin kithuk ding hi)  (s:aleh)
hih=(t:pron) (w:this) (as in <~ mun ah ding in>)
hihnu=(t:pron) (w:she/her) (as in <~ koi ah om a hiam?>)
hihpa=(t:pron) (w:he/him) (as in <~ koi ah om a hiam?>)
hihte=(t:pron) (w:these) (plural form of <hih>, as in, ~ pen Pasian nasepna hi)
himaw=(t:interjection) word expressing <surprise, joy, sudden> emotion
maw=(t:interjection) word expressing <surprise, joy, sudden> emotion
loin=(t:pron) (w:not one/not a one/no part/not a part/not a bit/not any)
loin=(t:adv) (w:not at all/not a bit/not the slightest bit/in no way/to no extent/by no means any/not for a moment)
loin=(t:preposition) (w:unaccompanied by/unescorted by/in the absence of)
awngthawlpi=(t:adj) a completely empty space (w:without form/void) (s:awngthawl)
ahi=(t:ppm) word indicating nominative case (as in <Pasian thu ~ hi>)
tengah=(t:preposition) (w:throughout/all over/all round/in every part of/all through/right through)
khua=(t:ppm) word indicating a particular mood of light or dark (e:~mial/~vak)
mial=(t:adv) without being able to see or continuous
tua=(t:pronoun) referring to a specific thing previously mentioned, known, or understood (w:that)
tuate=(t:pronoun) referring to a specific thing previously mentioned, known, or understood (w:those)
kha=(t:part) particle suffixed to verbs to convey the meaning of "happened" (e:nek ~, dawn~, hih~ pen hoih lo hi)
khak=(t:part) particle suffixed to verbs to convey the meaning of "happen to" (e:nek ~, dawn~, hih~ hoih lo hi)
tuitungah=(t:phrase) (w:over the face of the water)
om=(t:v) (w:abide) (e:Mihingte sungah ka Kha ~ paisuak nawn lo ding hi)
omte=(t:part) particle used in making a comparison (e:sunga ~ khempeuh)
ci=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:~ ahih ciangin)
ciangin=(t:conj) (w:and) as in Let there be light, and there was light"
mu=(t:v) (w:saw/found) as in lost object discovered.
pen=(t:ppm) (w:is) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:khuavak ~)
sun=(t:n) (w:day) as in during sun light
hong=(t:part) particle prefixed to form verb  (e:~ tung)
bei=(t:v) (w:pass/over) as Nitak hong bei-in, zingsang hong tung a
ni=(t:number) (w:day) as in counting of days number
la=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:om hen ~) (w:be)
mah=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:tua pen ~ hoih)
mah=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate selective case (e:tua ~~)
kung=(t:part) particle suffixed to form noun (e:sing~)
ciatciatin=(t:phrase) (w:to its kind) (e:amau’ nam ~ piangsak hi)
dingin=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:Sun le zan a khen dingin vantungah khuavakte om hen)
pawi=(t:n) (w:festival) a day or period of celebration
nading=(t:v) (w:dedicate) devote (time or effort) to a particular task or purpose.
uh=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:leitung khua a vaksak dingin vantungah khuavak hi ~ hen)
ding=(t:part) particle suffixed to form verb which indicate objective case (e:Leitungah khua a vaksak ~)
koih=(t:v) (w:put) put in a particular position.
honpite=(t:n) (w:crowd/multitude/swarm/throng) (plural form of <honpi>; as in, people)
honpite=(t:n) (w:herd/crowd/horde/mob) (plural form of <honpi>; as in, animals)
ta=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:vasate leeng ~ hen)
golpite=(t:adj) (w:large) (as in objects, plural form of <golpi)
golpite=(t:adj) (w:great) (as in creatures, plural form of <golpi)
tampi=(t:adj) (w:numerous) (quantity of being, plural form of <tam>)
pha=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (w:precious) (e:man~)
pha=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (w:lucky) (e:ham~)
pha=(t:adj) (w:good) emotional feeling of being (e:~ sa ing)
unla=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate nominative case (e:ci ~)
un=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate nominative case (e:ci ~)
nga=(t:n) (w:bird) (usually found in lyric as in, ~ bang leng)
lim=(t:n) (w:image) (e:Eima ~, eimah hong sunin mihing bawl ni)
mihing=(t:n) (w:man) (where it is not necessarly referring to just a male man)
note=(t:pronoun) (w:you) (plural form of <no>; as in, na khempeuh ~ tungah kong pia hi)
kong=(t:pronoun) (w:of which) particle prefixed to form verb (e:note ~ pia hi)
khinta=(t:part) particle suffixed to form verb past tense (e:kong pia ~ hi)
mahmah=(t:adv) (w:the very thing) (e:Pasian bawlsate ~ hoih lua ing)
kimat=(t:v) (w:arrest/seize) (e:Paul ~ nading thu, Moses ~ sawm ahih man in)
khin=(t:n) (w:smokehouse/drying rack) indigenous cultures, meat was often dried or smoked using wooden frames or tripods over slow-burning fires
cih=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:Bang hang hiam ~ leh)
kipiansak=(t:n) (w:generation) (e:Hihte pen, a ~ lai-a vantung le leitung tangthu ahi hi)
lai=(t:n) (w:writing) (of a composing text; as in, ~ nasim in)
Topa=(t:n) (w:Lord) (e:~ in lam hong lakding hi) (s:Pasian/mangpa)
nai=(t:part) particle prefixed to a verb to convey a negative sense as <yet> not (e:guah zusak ~ lo)
lokhawh=(t:part) particle prefixed to form nouns (e:~na, ~ding hun)
kho=(t:v) (w:farm/practise farming) (e:lo ~ ding, an hau ding)
tawh=(t:n) (w:key) (in as, inn ~ na kalh kei un)
tawh=(t:n) (w:firestarting) (in as, mei na ~ ve, an huan ding)
lui=(t:adj) (w:old) (of objects which are just old)
kei=(t:conj) (w:do not/shall not/ will not) (e:na kisia sak ~ in)
sak=(t:part) particle suffixed to form verb past tense (e:lak ~/ piak ~/ zong ~)
sak=(t:ppm) postpositional marker indicating future action or state (equivalent in usage to auxiliary verbs "will", "shall")
ahiam=(t:part) sentence final denoting interrogation or exclamation (e:hih kua ~?)
ahia=(t:part) sentence final denoting interrogation or exclamation (e:hih bang ~?)
nu=(t:n) (w:woman) (e:mipa kiangah tua ~ a paipih hi)
ciangun=(t:ppm) postpositional marker indicating its been done (e:zatui anek ~ a cidam)
khit=(t:part) particle suffixed to form verb past tense (e:an nek ~ ciang)
paisuak=(t:adv) (w:forever) (e:Mihingte sungah ka Kha om ~ nawn lo ding hi)
loh=(t:part) particle suffixed to a verb to convey a negative sense (e:muh ~ dingin)
nang=(t:v) (w:prop up/support) (of bent trees, objects, etc)
naupai=(t:n) (w:pregnancy) (the correct spelling is <~i> with dobule i)
mang=(t:v) (w:obey) obey an order; listen to advice

mateng=(t:ppm) post-positional marker indicating a certain span of time or distance (as in nong ciahkik ~, an nelo ding hi ung) (equivalent in usage to the prepositions "up to", "as far as" ,"to" in English).
hawlkhia=(t:v) (w:drove out) to cause or force (someone or something) to leave
khopa=(t:ppm) postpositional marker to indicate objective case (e:lo ~ )
khopa=(t:part) particle suffixed to a noun to form verb past tense (e:a kipat ~)
sungin=(t:part) word combined with a noun to indicating a time or period (e:tua hun ~)thah
lecin=(t:part)  particle suffixed to a word or phrase as emphasis  (e:nasem ~ hoih ding hi).
buk=(t:v) (w:rule over/control) (e:Limtakin na hih kei le nang hong hih nuamin mawhna in hong ~ a) (s:uk)
zawh=(t:v) (w:rule over/win) (e:Ahih hangin nang in tua mawhna na ~ ding ahi hi)
keimah=(t:determiner) (w:my) (e:~ gim hong kipiakna, ka thuak zawh ding hi lo hi.)
kipiakna=(t:part) particle conveying the meaning "give, given" used in combination with verb
notkhia=(t:v) (w:drive away) force to leave a place.
zah=(t:part) numerical classifier used in counting the number of times per equal amount (e:a ~ sagih)
thuk=(t:v) (w:revenge) (e:nang tunga hong mawhte na ~ kei in)
thahkha=(t:v) (w:to cause the death) see <thah> and <kha>
thahkhak=(t:v) (w:to cause the death) see <thah> and <khak>
tamin=(t:n) (w:child name) (e:ka ~ ding pen...) see <ta> and <min>

ngei=(t:part) (w:have been) (e:tua thute thei~ lo hi ung)
ahihleh=(t:part) particle comparison between verbs to delineate their relationship (e:pai ~ lunggulh kei ing)
kipanin=(t:ppm) postpositional marker equivalent to the locative preposition, "from" (e:tua mun a ~)
phak=(t:v) (w:reach) (e:Adam kum za le kum sawmthum a ~ khit ciangin)
veina=(t:part) particle showing number of times (e:khat ~, thum ~)
inla=(t:part) particle suffixed to a verb to effect politeness
inla=(t:ppm) postpositional marker indicating future action or state (equivalent in usage to auxiliary verbs "will", "shall")
tutak=(t:adv) (w:at the moment/at present/just now/right now/at the present time)
tu takin=(t:phrase) (w:at the moment/at present/just now/right now/at the present time)
bangcia=(t:adv) (w:why) for what reason or purpose
kalai=(t:exclamation) (w:alas) (of expressing grief, pity, or concern)
laiphai=(t:plant) (w:papyrus) (e:~ kungte po thei ahi hiam)
suakta=(t:v) (w:get away/get out//run away/run off/break out/break free)
